basic_details.job_title: CSIR-NEERI Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) Project Associate-II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website neeri.res.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. / Integrated Masters in Microbiology/ Biotechnology/ Environmental Science from a recognized University AND 02 years experience in Research and Development and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services
qualification.details: M.Sc. / Integrated Masters in Microbiology/ Biotechnology/ Environmental Science from a recognized University. 02 years of experience in Research and Development and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35,000/- + HRA (for CSIR-UGC/ICAR/ICMR NET/GATE qualified) OR Rs. 28,000/- + HRA (for others) Per Month.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II recruitment is 27th May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-II post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Project Associate-II position in the CSIR-NEERI recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for Project Associate-II?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is an M.Sc. or Integrated Masters in Microbiology, Biotechnology, or Environmental Science from a recognized university, along with 2 years of relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-II post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-II role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 35,000/- + HRA for candidates who are CSIR-UGC/ICAR/ICMR NET/GATE qualified, and Rs. 28,000/- + HRA for others, per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-II posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Online Interview, which will be conducted through platforms like MS Team or Skype.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual. Therefore, it is not a permanent government position.
